created_at.description:
When the version was created.
The format is https://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc3339.txt.
Example: "2006-01-02T15:04:05.999999Z".

modified_at.description:
Most recent time when the version was updated.
The format is https://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc3339.txt.
Example: "2006-01-02T15:04:05.999999Z".

visibility.description:
The visibility field represents whether this message is privately/publicly visible.
To be visible to the public the App that contains it AND the User that contains the App must
also be publicly visible.

nodes.description:
The list of nodes that make up the workflow version. Each node can specify an input node
that it connects to in order to define the graph.

metadata.title:
To handle arbitrary json metadata you can use a struct field:
https://github.com/google/protobuf/blob/master/src/google/protobuf/struct.proto

app_id.description: The app the workflow version belongs to.

user_id.description: The user the workflow version belongs to.

description.title: Short description about this workflow version

license.title: License associated to this workflow version

is_deprecated.description:
If a model version associated with the workflow version is deleted, the workflow version
will be marked as deprecated.
